texto: A woman should never go so far with someone, that she cannot come back alone...not for love..not for society…not for herself. It took me so long to find my way back.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Priyanka Naik sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “A woman should never go so far with someone, that she cannot come back alone...not for love..not …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, lessons-learned, love, útil em momentos de love e reflection.

texto: What are memories but photo images from the mind? Isn't the human mind so much like a camera, saving pictures every now and then?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Priyanka Naik: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “What are memories but photo images from the mind? Isn't the human mind so much like a camera, sav…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, memories, photo pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: It’s amusing how we can sometimes hardly remember our first meetings with the most important people in our lives. Where, how, when we first met becomes all a blur. Somewhere along the way, we realize we have become so emotionally tethered to one another that the moment we first met does not matter. Life before meeting them ceases to exist.
explicacao: Citação de Priyanka Naik sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “It’s amusing how we can sometimes hardly remember our first meetings with the most important peop…” articula reflexao, emotional, nostalgic em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como nostalgic e reminiscent.

texto: It’s funny how our desires often tend to circle around the whims and fancies of others rather than the self. One school of thought has a convincing explanation that this is because we live in a society that makes us want to be pleasing to others more than the self--a rather selfless trait, so to think. But then there is this other theory which eventually concludes that we do all of this to please no one but the self...because praise and compliments are what the devil thrives on, and we are in no significant way any different.
explicacao: Citação de Priyanka Naik sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It’s funny how our desires often tend to circle around the whims and fancies of others rather tha…” articula reflexao, human-nature, praise em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e praise.
